identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a 'Neural Dark' aesthetic that blends academic rigor with cyberpunk fluidity. Avoid generic SaaS tropes.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Academic layouts with Cyberpunk neon.
Emotion First: Learning is a journey into the unknown (dark) illuminated by knowledge (light).
Content is King: Course content drives the layout.
Zoom In: Focus on progress metrics and code snippets.
Negative Space: Use deep dark voids to let content glow.

headings.usage: Main headers, section titles. DO NOT use Space Grotesk.

code.usage: Code snippets, technical terms, AI prompts.

features: Widgets: Cardless or subtle border (1px solid #1e293b)
Charts: High contrast, neon lines on dark bg

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary hover:bg-secondary/80 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-4 border border-white/10

cards.classes: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-2xl hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.classes: bg-input/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) to the entire body to kill digital flatness.

3d_library.name: react-spring-parallax
3d_library.usage: Use for the landing page hero section to create depth between text and abstract background layers.

hero_background.alt: Abstract neural network glowing blue purple dark background

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text unless it's a very subtle shine.
DO NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #020617 or #0a0a0a.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Implement a 'Course Creation Wizard' with step-by-step progress indication.
Dashboard must show 'Learning Streak' and 'XP' to gamify the experience.
